name: Malicious Blown Kiss
outcome: The pink slime woman purses her lips and touches them with two fingers before letting out a teasing 'Mwah♥' as she cooingly blows the smooch your way, conjuring a floating heart that flies through the air right into you, charring bliss washing through you as the sensory magic delivers a hot kiss right onto your skin, blissful mind-numbing tingles lingering on your body while she smiles invitingly at you.
miss: The pink slime woman purses her lips and touches them with two fingers before letting out a teasing 'Mwah♥' as she cooingly blows the smooch your way, conjuring a floating heart you quickly leap away from, avoiding the sultry sensory magic!
statusOutcome: The sinister enchanted kiss seeps into your senses like sweet luxurious honey, dampening your willingness to fight back...
